text: Look , how grand magnificent the Tiananmen Gate tour is !

speaker: speaker1
text: It is largest pop square in the world.you see that is monument for the people's hero , and the Chairman Mao memorial hall on the south.there is great hall of the people on the west.there are two museums on the east .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's the Forbidden city on the north of Gate building .

speaker: speaker2
text: All the sightseeing in china is very attractive and crescive.travelling to China is very worth one.thank you so much for your guides , and I'll miss you .
